styling.name: bgimage
styling.description: Sets background-image. Format: url size repeat position

typography.name: uppercase
typography.description: Converts text to uppercase. Pass 'true' for first-letter only.

dom.name: clone
dom.description: Clones target element's children into this element

dom.name: prepend
dom.description: Prepends target element as first child

dom.name: append
dom.description: Clones and appends children from target element

dom.name: rerun
dom.description: Re-runs FTML attribute processing on element

dom.name: escape
dom.description: Converts first char to HTML entity

dom.name: slice
dom.description: Slices element text content. Format: start,end

dom.name: metadata
dom.description: Sets innerHTML from meta tag content

dom.name: hrefhost
dom.description: Resolves href based on current hostname

dom.name: include
dom.description: Loads external HTML file into the element

dom.name: loader
dom.description: Hides element and shows a loader target

insert.name: insertafterbegin
insert.description: Inserts content after begin of element

insert.name: insertbeforeend
insert.description: Inserts content before end of element

insert.name: insertafterend
insert.description: Inserts content after end of element

insert.name: insertbeforebegin
insert.description: Inserts content before begin of element

binding.name: bindvar
binding.description: Binds variables to element. Format: variable:value;...

binding.name: bindquery
binding.description: Binds query string value. Format: variable:queryParam

binding.name: bindglobal
binding.description: Binds global app variable. Format: variable:globalPath

binding.name: bindasset
binding.description: Binds cached asset data. Format: variable:assetKey.path

binding.name: bindappend
binding.description: Binds content from another element. Format: selector.attr:variable

binding.name: bindfield
binding.description: Two-way binds input to target element. Format: variable:selector

trim.name: trimleft
trim.description: Trims characters from left of text

trim.name: trimright
trim.description: Trims characters from right of text

map.name: maptext
map.description: Maps value to text from enum

map.name: maprun
map.description: Maps value to a function call

map.name: mapclass
map.description: Maps value to a class name

map.name: mapbindvar
map.description: Maps value to bind variables from enum

events.name: mouseover
events.description: Action to run on mouseover. Format: attr:[value]

events.name: mouseout
events.description: Action to run on mouseout. Format: attr:[value]

data.name: data-src
data.description: URL to fetch JSON data from

data.name: data-srcjoin
data.description: Secondary URL to merge data from

data.name: data-get
data.description: Maps JSON property to element content. Format: key or key:#selector

data.name: data-set
data.description: Sets variable from JSON. Format: variable:jsonKey

data.name: data-bind
data.description: Binds JSON value to variable

data.name: data-iterate
data.description: Iterates over array in response. Use 'true' for root array or path.

data.name: data-iterate-skip
data.description: Excludes element from iteration cloning

data.name: data-filteritem
data.description: Filters array items. Format: key:'value'

data.name: data-filterkey
data.description: Specifies which key in response to filter

data.name: data-sort
data.description: Sort response array by key

data.name: data-sortorder
data.description: Sort direction

data.name: data-merge
data.description: Merge keys from joined response. Format: key1;key2

data.name: data-replace
data.description: Replace values in response data

data.name: data-header
data.description: Custom request headers

data.name: data-loader
data.description: Selector for loader element to show during fetch

data.name: data-wait
data.description: Delay in ms before fetching (default: 250)

data.name: data-ttl
data.description: Cache TTL for the request

data.name: data-status
data.description: Element to show on non-200 status

data.name: data-onfinish
data.description: Callback after all data processing is complete

data.name: data-onsuccess
data.description: Callback on successful response (status 200)

data.name: data-onbeforesuccess
data.description: Callback before success processing

data.name: data-onaftersuccess
data.description: Callback after success processing

data.name: data-onerror
data.description: Callback or element to show on error

data.name: data-onempty
data.description: Element to show when response is empty

data.name: data-ongetload
data.description: Callback after data-get processes on this element

data.name: data-onsetload
data.description: Callback after data-set processes on this element

data.name: data-onkeyempty
data.description: Callback when iterated key is missing or empty

data.name: data-reqpost
data.description: URL for POST request

data.name: data-reqget
data.description: URL for GET request

data.name: data-reqpatch
data.description: URL for PATCH request

data.name: data-reqdelete
data.description: URL for DELETE request

data.name: data-bindpayload
data.description: Binds form field to request payload variable

data.name: data-bindheader
data.description: Binds response header to element. Format: headerName:selector

template.name: srcdoc
template.description: Path to the start page template

modules.name: globalize-get
modules.description: Globalize: gets translated text for element

plugins.name: wave--load
plugins.description: Wave plugin: starts wave animation on container

plugins.name: wave-slices
plugins.description: Wave plugin: number of horizontal slices (default: 40)

misc.name: onconfirmvalue
misc.description: Action on confirm result. Format: true;functionName
